# Milestones — {PROJECT_NAME}

## Milestones
| Milestone | Goal | Exit criteria | Target window | Risks |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Prototype | Prove the core loop | Playable core loop | Set during planning | Scope creep, engine drift |
| Vertical Slice | Prove quality bar | One polished slice | Set after the prototype is validated | Content throughput, readability |
| Demo/Beta | Prove retention / release path | Stable external build | Set after the slice is stable | Build pipeline maturity, release polish |

Always replace the target window with a concrete date or sprint range when the milestone becomes active.

## Dependencies
- External SDKs / store accounts / contractors / approvals
